positive: A minimalist, vibrant graphic design featuring a stylized celestial map merged with botanical elements. The main subject is a central crescent moon, rendered in deep indigo and metallic gold linework, surrounded by scientifically detailed yet fanciful illustrations of constellations, nebulae, and exotic, oversized foliage (like stylized monstera leaves and delicate ferns). The overall composition must be circular or centered, emphasizing clean black lines against a subtle, textured cream background. Use a high contrast, neo-Victorian engraving aesthetic with pop-art color accents (teal, mustard yellow). The style should be highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel, with defined edges and a vintage, ethereal scholarly feel. Overhead studio lighting, crisp vector quality.
negative: blurry, messy, grunge, photorealistic, 3d render, logo, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, signature, amateur, gradient blur, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
